ValidationRule.description: When Issue ='Account Transfer' then the future account owner and current account owner both are required
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( Issue__c , 'Account Transfer') , NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_Operation_Request_VRs__c), OR(ISBLANK( Current_account_owner__c ) ,ISBLANK( Future_account_owner__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The current Account Owner and Future Account Owner both are required when Issue is Account Transfer. Please make sure both are not empty.
